title: TrueCelestials
description: makes the sun and moon face the player for better texture pack making.
body:
this mod fixes the static shape of the sun and moon, to have its upside of the texture always faces up when it renders in the world

it has configs too (where hard to implement)
#
### side by side comparition:
![jake made this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b867f2589b7614c271d482409a64863ecb2c503.png)

### great vanilla potentia: 
![axolotl sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3746d01803a57b534c6d2f19d01e9c0085f90c4b.png)
#
if you are using this with vannila sun and moon this mod is practicaly usless, so go cheek out my axolotl sun and moon (still not on modrinth yet)

plans for the future:
- support for all 21 version
- test with sodium
